non_goals: A parallel source or slice contract.
Any change to Jira or publication approval policy.
technical_acceptance_criteria: Extract the declared slice manifest before manager dispatch.
Require generated Subtask cardinality, order, IDs, dependencies, budgets, and canonical path arrays to equal the contract manifest.
Reject omitted, duplicate, reordered, extra, or aggregated-path slices before plan acceptance.
Confirm the manager catalog renders each distinct source body once while trace records retain PRD, specification, and roadmap role bindings.
validation_plan: Run focused declared-slice and three-source end-to-end planning tests.
Run make test, make vet, make build, and git diff --check.
Obtain independent exact-diff reviewer and verifier assessments from distinct fixed-role external executors.

handoff.status: ready for linked Phase 3 planning baseline
handoff.completed_work: Completed and reviewed REK-23, recorded its commit in Jira, moved REK-23 to In Review, and transitioned REK-24 to In Progress with read-back.
handoff.next_action: Commit this linked Phase 3 planning baseline, run implementation preflight, and implement only the declared-slice-coverage slice.
